title: Hiring Medical Officer at Jaypee Hospital

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at Jaypee Hospital
jsonLd.description:
Jaypee Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jaypee Hospital:
Jaypee Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jaypee Hospital!
